title: Valhalla Tavern Calendar Scraper
description: Scrapes event listings from the Valhalla Tavern Milkshake (msha.ke) link-in-bio page. Each event card is extracted with date, lineup, cover charge, and ticket links.

url.title: Valhalla Tavern Page URL
url.description: The URL of the Valhalla Tavern Milkshake page.

requestTimeoutSecs.title: Request Timeout (seconds)
requestTimeoutSecs.description: Timeout for the HTTP request to fetch the page.
